spec.description: Nvidia GPU Metrics based on the prometheus metrics from github.com/utkuozdemir/nvidia_gpu_exporter

spec.title: GPU Utilization %
spec.description:
Percent of time over the past sample period during which one or more kernels was executing on the GPU.
The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

spec.title: Memory Utilization %
spec.description:
Percent of time over the past sample period during which global (device) memory was being read or written.
The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

spec.title: Graphics Clock Speed
spec.description: Current frequency of graphics (shader) clock.

spec.title: Driver Version
spec.description: The version of the installed NVIDIA display driver. This is an alphanumeric string.

spec.title: Temperature
spec.description: Core GPU temperature. in degrees C.

spec.title: Temperature
spec.description: Core GPU temperature. in degrees C.

spec.title: Memory Allocation
spec.description: Total memory allocated by active contexts.

spec.title: Memory Clock Speed
spec.description: Current frequency of memory clock.

spec.title: Video Clock Speed
spec.description: Current frequency of video encoder/decoder clock.

spec.title: GPU Clock Speed %
spec.description:
Current frequency of graphics (shader) clock
/
Maximum frequency of graphics (shader) clock.

spec.title: Power Draw %
spec.description: The last measured power draw for the entire board, in watts. Only available if power management is supported. This reading is accurate to within +/- 5 watts / The software power limit in watts.

spec.title: P-State
spec.description: The current performance state for the GPU. States range from P0 (maximum performance) to P12 (minimum performance).

spec.title: Name
spec.description: The official product name of the GPU. This is an alphanumeric string. For all products.

spec.title: SM Clock Speed
spec.description: Current frequency of SM (Streaming Multiprocessor) clock.

spec.title: Memory Allocation %
spec.description: Total memory allocated by active contexts / Total installed GPU memory.

spec.title: Throttle Reasons
spec.description: Information about factors that are reducing the frequency of clocks. If all throttle reasons are returned as "Not Active" it means that clocks are running as high as possible.

spec.title: Memory Clock Speed %
spec.description: Current frequency of memory clock / Maximum frequency of memory clock

spec.title: Vbios Version
spec.description: The BIOS of the GPU board.

spec.title: Fan Speed %
spec.description: The fan speed value is the percent of the product's maximum noise tolerance fan speed that the device's fan is currently intended to run at. This value may exceed 100% in certain cases. Note: The reported speed is the intended fan speed. If the fan is physically blocked and unable to spin, this output will not match the actual fan speed. Many parts do not report fan speeds because they rely on cooling via fans in the surrounding enclosure.

spec.title: GPU Utilization %
spec.description:
Percent of time over the past sample period during which one or more kernels was executing on the GPU.
The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

spec.title: Memory Utilization %
spec.description:
Percent of time over the past sample period during which global (device) memory was being read or written.
The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

spec.title: Power Draw
spec.description: The last measured power draw for the entire board, in watts. Only available if power management is supported. This reading is accurate to within +/- 5 watts

spec.title: Fan Speed %
spec.description: The fan speed value is the percent of the product's maximum noise tolerance fan speed that the device's fan is currently intended to run at. This value may exceed 100% in certain cases. Note: The reported speed is the intended fan speed. If the fan is physically blocked and unable to spin, this output will not match the actual fan speed. Many parts do not report fan speeds because they rely on cooling via fans in the surrounding enclosure.

spec.title: Nvidia GPU Metrics
